dashboard.motto: Keep up the good work today!
dashboard.dueNotice: You have {count} words waiting for review
dashboard.dueHint: Strike while the iron is hot!
dashboard.noRecentReading: No recent reading history. Browse the public library, add a book to your shelf, and start reading.
dashboard.dueAriaLabel: Due for review today, {count} words, go to review
dashboard.vocabAriaLabel: Total vocabulary {count} entries, go to vocabulary

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.emptyTitle: No words in your vocabulary list
vocabulary.emptyHint: Click "Add Manually" or select words while reading to add them
vocabulary.deleteDescription: You'll need to re-add it while reading to get it back.

settings.title: Settings
settings.avatarHint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, max 2MB per image, stored in Vercel Blob. Uploading a new avatar replaces the previous one.
settings.displayNamePlaceholder: Optional, name shown in the app
settings.displayNameHint: Not required for email signup; OAuth login pre-fills from provider.
settings.timezoneHint: Used for daily reading time, vocabulary daily add limit, and review scheduling. Leave empty to use the browser-reported timezone.
settings.timezoneOffsetHint: Brackets show current GMT offset (DST regions change by season).
settings.otherTimezonePlaceholder: If not in list, type here, e.g. Europe/Zurich
settings.aboutAlgo: Vocabulary review uses Ebbinghaus spaced repetition algorithm
settings.githubHint: Welcome to report issues and contribute code
settings.readerColorSchemeHint: Choose the color style for EPUB book content (applies to both dark and light themes)

landing.heroDesc: Import your EPUB books, mark new words while reading, and review them with the Ebbinghaus spaced repetition system to steadily grow your vocabulary.
landing.feature1Desc: Import EPUB books, read smoothly online, with automatic reading progress saved
landing.feature2Desc: Select any word while reading to save it instantly, with automatic phonetics and definitions
landing.feature3Desc: Reviews scheduled by Ebbinghaus forgetting curve to help you memorize words efficiently
landing.srsDesc: Scientifically scheduled review sessions — master a word in at most 6 reviews

auth.loginSubtitle: Phone code, email/password, or a third-party account
auth.fillPhoneCode: Enter your phone number and the code
auth.invalidPhone: Enter a valid number for the selected country
auth.fillEmailPassword: Please fill in email and password
auth.loginFailed: Sign in failed, please try again

common.authErrorDesc: OAuth authentication failed. Authorization may have been denied or the configuration is incorrect.

plan.title: Review Plan
plan.subtitle: Grouped by learning timezone calendar day (same as reading time and vocabulary daily limit); today's count includes all overdue items.
plan.legendToday: Today: shows all currently due items (same as dashboard)
plan.legendPast: Past: scheduled words still due; click to start review if any are due
plan.legendFuture: Future: preview only, not yet due

library.title: My Bookshelf
library.subtitle: Books uploaded here are only visible to you. Browse the public library to add books here.
library.noEpubHint: No EPUB? Find one at an external site.
library.emptyHint: Upload your first EPUB book and start reading
library.fromPublicLibTitle: From public library — cover and file managed by the library
library.storeSubtitle: Browse public books and click for details. Starting a book from the detail page automatically adds it to your shelf.
library.removeCoverDesc: The shelf will show a placeholder. You can re-upload at any time.
library.deleteBookDesc: "{title}" and its files cannot be recovered.
library.removeFromShelfDesc: "{title}" will be removed from your shelf only. It remains in the public library and can be added again.
library.alreadyOnShelf: This book is already on your shelf
library.readDesc: Starting to read automatically adds this book to your shelf, accessible from My Bookshelf anytime.

review.previewNote: These words are scheduled for this day but not yet due — preview only.
review.emptyTodayTitle: No words to review right now
review.emptyPreviewTitle: No words scheduled for this day
review.emptyPastTitle: No overdue reviews for this day
review.emptyTodayHint: If you just finished, today's session is complete. Check the review plan for upcoming items.
review.emptyDateHint: Go back to the calendar to pick another date, or keep reading to build your vocabulary.
review.finishedHint: Only words with both correct meaning and spelling advance in spaced repetition. Wrong answers go to the end of this round. Cleared words are saved locally so you won't redo them today after a refresh.
review.noMeaningNote: Could not retrieve a Chinese gloss for this word. Spelling only this round.
review.choosePrompt: Choose the correct Chinese meaning (flip to see English)
review.wrongAnswer: Wrong — this card moves to the end of the round.
review.spellingPromptPhrase: Click word tiles or type the full phrase below
review.spellingPromptChunk: Click chunks/letters or type the full word below
review.spellingPromptLetter: Click letters or type the full word below
review.clickWordsBelow: Click word tiles below, or use the input box
review.clickChunksBelow: Click chunks or letters below, or use the input box
review.clickLettersBelow: Click letters below, or use the input box
review.spellingError: Spelling doesn't match the target. Edit your selection or input and resubmit.
review.reviewInfo: Distractors come primarily from Datamuse word associations, supplemented by similar-looking words from your vocabulary pool. Spelling: single words offer both chunks and letters (with a few distractors); phrases use word-block tiles or free input.
review.wrongMoved: Wrong — moved to the end of this round
review.spellingWrong: Incorrect spelling, please fix and resubmit

dialog.addVocabDesc: Type a word and we'll look up its phonetics and definitions (same source as reader lookup). Everything is saved when you add to vocabulary.
dialog.wordPlaceholder: e.g. serendipity or in spite of
dialog.noWordYet: Type a word or phrase to see phonetics and definitions
dialog.noDefinitionOrTranslation: No definition or translation found. Check spelling or try again later.
dialog.contextPlaceholder: Source sentence, chapter, or your own note…
dialog.titleEnterWord: Please enter a word or phrase first
dialog.titleWaitingDef: Please wait for the definition to load
dialog.titleAlreadyIn: This word is already in your vocabulary list
dialog.addedSuccess: "{word}" added to vocabulary and scheduled for review
dialog.fillWord: Please enter a word or phrase

wordPopup.deleteDescription: You'll need to re-add it while reading to get it back.
wordPopup.waitLoading: Please wait for definition and vocabulary status to load

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.subtitle: Just email and password — you can set a display name in Settings later.
signup.emailDesc: Used for sign in. We won't share your email.
signup.autoLoginFailed: Registered successfully, but auto sign-in failed. Please go back to the login page.

upload.selectEpubFirst: Please select an EPUB file first
upload.coverHint: Embedded cover shown after selecting book; replace with JPG/PNG/WebP (max 5MB)
upload.storeUploadDesc: Visible to all users after upload. Title and level will be auto-detected. You'll be redirected to the library when done.
upload.noEpubHint: No EPUB? Find one at an external site.
